_comment: B-15 — Curated allow-list of TruNorth slugs whose primary revenue is oil/gas/coal extraction or refining. Source: public investor disclosures + Wikipedia 'List of largest oil and gas companies by revenue'. Excludes integrated utilities (Duke, Southern Co) — those have a separate emissions story. Coal-only miners are included. Curated conservatively 2026-06-07.

_format.rationale: <one line: why this brand is a fossil-fuel industry member>

exxonmobil.rationale: Largest U.S. integrated oil major; upstream E&P + refining + petrochemicals.

chevron.rationale: U.S. integrated oil major; upstream + downstream + Chevron Phillips Chemical JV.

shell-usa.rationale: U.S. arm of Shell plc — integrated oil & gas major.

bp-usa.rationale: U.S. arm of BP plc — integrated oil & gas major.

conocophillips.rationale: Largest pure-play independent E&P in the U.S.

totalenergies-usa.rationale: U.S. arm of TotalEnergies SE — French oil & gas major.

equinor-asa.rationale: Norwegian state oil major (formerly Statoil); offshore E&P.

occidental-petroleum.rationale: U.S. independent E&P (Permian focus post-Anadarko acquisition).

pioneer-natural-resources.rationale: U.S. independent E&P, Permian pure-play (acquired by ExxonMobil 2024).

baker-hughes.rationale: Global oilfield services + LNG equipment (GE spinoff).

glencore-plc.rationale: Swiss commodity trader; major thermal & metallurgical coal producer.
